text.message: Hi Vayne. Good morning from USA
this is gonna be a good one
they are all good to me. just want to have a relaxing morning with coffee
u r not gonna plow me black right?
black with the coordinated 9s for a street is very nice on this board
why didn't you accept before black
I didn’t see til the last second and you popped
Nowhere to block you and red
So now I have no brick too
you're ahead alot black. that port is so strong
I citied that spot just for the 2
3 2s so far and all were bonkers
red what are you doing with all that brick
and black as road pretty much safed
longest road for sure .. that's 8 pt
we need to 9 and 6 perma block
catan god is rewarding you this morning black
i want to get a knight
i trade u my next ore
Think it’s rolled more than 9 tbh
i dont think we can stop black
red what u need to extend
I’m telling you red double plays
Not sure how much help he needs
black is trying really hard to get us to target red lol
i'm only gonna trade with oj
But just saying maybe don’t feed red
oj might pull some wild play here
ok i guess we are all close here
im not at 9 pts. i'm no where close lol
I think red and oj got the best chances
Can’t be too many devs left
I’m further than you think. Need 2 9s
i cant get army or road
i think red on 9 maybe actually
Ok you’re not a threat anymore oj
Waiting to mono ore for the win
